assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes version compatibility checks with 'istioctl version' and 'Verify GKE 1.32 compatibility with your Istio version' commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking compatibility, it doesn't specifically reference or recommend consulting the official Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention upgrading Istio itself if incompatible - it only shows upgrading GKE control plane and nodes

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: While it mentions sidecar injection monitoring, it doesn't explain the mutating webhook mechanism or potential issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to monitor sidecar injection and verify workload sidecar injection status post-upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes 'istioctl proxy-status' commands and monitoring of proxy versions in the validation section

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides specific commands like 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check proxy status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While it mentions certificate rotation issues and monitoring connectivity, it doesn't specifically warn about traffic disruption from control plane and sidecar version mismatches
